scope: L group first-round score, 1X2 probabilities, odds comparison, and conditional betting leans. No final qualification projection.

sources.name: OddsChecker Ghana vs Panama
supports: Ghana vs Panama 1X2 and totals snapshot

calibration_adjustments: raised draw baseline after recent group-stage draw-heavy misses
separated possession dominance from win conversion
method.odds_treatment: odds converted to implied probabilities and normalized when complete 1X2 snapshot was available

market_snapshot.market_note: Market is materially higher on England single win than this model.

scoreline_rationale: England have higher attacking ceiling but uncertain final Tuchel structure.
Croatia's midfield press resistance and tempo control raise draw probability.
Saka fitness and England left-side balance require T-75m refresh.
A low-tempo first-round match state points toward under and draw cover.
conditional_betting_lean: avoid chasing England moneyline if price remains short
Croatia +1 or +1.25 preferred to Croatia outright

market_snapshot.market_note: Market makes Ghana a slight favorite; model gives more weight to draw and Panama low-block resistance.

scoreline_rationale: Ghana have superior individual upside through Kudus, Semenyo and Partey.
Panama's compact block, set pieces and Carrasquilla progression raise low-score upset/draw paths.
Totals market aligns with a low-scoring match script.
conditional_betting_lean: Ghana moneyline at +105 is not a strong edge unless lineup news is excellent
under 2.5 is more coherent than Ghana moneyline
Panama +0.5 or +0.75 can be considered if available at fair price

known_limitations: odds are public snapshot/range, not guaranteed live best price
injury and suspension data require final matchday refresh
